title: Hildmannia horrida
taxonomy: Hildmannia horrida belongs to the family Celastraceae. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Hildmannia. Hildmannia horrida is native to Australia and is a part of the Southern Hemisphere flora. The plant is often found in dry and open forests as well as in rocky outcrops. Classification of Hildmannia horrida is ongoing, but current research suggests it has connections to the family Celastraceae.
